raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged for a purchase from XXXX that I did not make. 

After receiving many email solicitations fom XXXX, sometimes several in one day, I contacted them and asked them to stop. After that, I received an invoice from them by email. I did not subscribe to their service. I have never used their service.. After their charge appeared on my card bill, I contacted American Express and told them this. They said they would look into it. About a week ago, they sent me a letter saying the dispute had been resolved in my favor. But yesterday I received a letter saying thy were making the charge!
